demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've been in the bathroom 15 times today, my stomach is in knots, and the room spins completely when I try to stand.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The diarrhoea suddenly got much worse today and now I'm so dizzy when I stand up that I'm scared I'll fall — I live on my own and I can't even get to the kitchen for a drink.

symptom_narrative.onset: the diarrhoea suddenly got much worse over the last day, on top of months of on-and-off loose motions
symptom_narrative.duration: much worse for about a day; the looser bowels and tiredness have been building for around six months
symptom_narrative.character: bulky, really foul-smelling, greasy-looking stools that float, with a lot of bloating and painful wind
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I've been to the toilet about 15 times today and I feel completely wiped out
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up makes the dizziness much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been exhausted for months, I've been losing weight even though I'm eating normally, I've got an itchy blistery rash on my elbows, and I get dizzy and the room spins whenever I stand
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had on-and-off loose bowels and tiredness for months but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed today — I'm too dizzy to safely get to the bathroom or make myself a drink

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: low iron / anaemia that the iron tablets don't seem to be fixing
past_medical_history.how_managed: prescribed iron tablets, but they don't seem to make any difference

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; today too dizzy to safely prepare food or get drinks independently

objective_data_offered.value: about 60 kg on my bathroom scales
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: home bathroom scales, single reading; patient notes she has been losing weight

objective_data_offered.value: grouped little itchy blisters on my elbows and forearms, some scratched raw from itching
I look really pale and washed out
